name: Sweet and Sour Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the onions and arrange in a 1-quart baking dish.
2. Mix the remaining ingredients and pour over the onions.
3. Bake at 300°F for 1 hour.
Yield: 4 - 6 servings
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLES EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE (I would reduce the margarine to make it even lower than 1 fat exchange, to 1/2 fat. I WILL use a sugar substitute, yes.)
